title: CypherX Cursor Pagination Envelope (Contract 9)
description: The response envelope for every list endpoint. Cursor-based pagination only — no offset pagination. `total` is null unless the caller explicitly requested it (it is expensive to compute). Endpoints set `data` to the concrete item type.

data.description: The page of results. Item type is defined by the concrete list endpoint that extends this envelope.

limit.description: The page size that was applied to this request.

has_more.description: True when more results exist beyond this page (i.e. next_cursor can be followed).

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor to fetch the next page, or null when there are no further pages.

total.description: Total number of matching items. Null unless explicitly requested by the caller (expensive).
